ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping (e.g., Regular Air, Delivery Truck) */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment the customer belongs to (e.g., Corporate, Home Office) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located (e.g., West, Central) */,
  "state_or_province" TEXT /* State or province where the customer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to (e.g., Furniture, Office Supplies) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category the product belongs to (e.g., Tables, Labels) */,
  "container" TEXT /* Type of container used for shipping the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of the product per unit */,
  "product_base_margin" REAL /* Base margin for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the order item (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping mode */,
  "shipping_mode" TEXT /* Name of the shipping mode (e.g., Regular Air, Delivery Truck) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the mode */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the shipping mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_shipping_mode FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_mode") REFERENCES orders ("ship_mode")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., West, Central) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_region_name FOREIGN KEY ("region_name") REFERENCES customers ("region")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the shipping address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "state_or_province" TEXT /* State or province of the shipping address */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the shipping address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
